summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Hungarian CRM system - excellent functionality with minor gender detection issues

minor_bugs.issue: Gender detection working only for 1/5 workers (Szabó Anna detected as 'nő', others 'not detected')
Rate limiting (5 requests per minute) causes testing difficulties

integration_issues.issue: Only 1 of 5 workers shows gender correctly

passed_tests: ✅ Hungarian language interface (Dolgozó CRM, navigation in Hungarian)
✅ Worker management (5 workers visible in table)
✅ Action buttons (View, Edit, Delete with proper data-testid)
✅ Status workflow (Feldolgozatlan → Próbára vár → Próba megbeszélve → Dolgozik)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix gender detection algorithm - currently only detecting 1/5 workers (Szabó Anna as 'nő'). János, Péter, István, Mária names should be detected automatically. Otherwise system is excellent!
